channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'Exceptional performance for an extremely balanced price': GMKtec M6 Ultra is our number one mini PC for work and study — and it's $100 off at Amazon right now
item.description: Our number one rated mini PC is $100 off at Amazon right now, with Ryzen 5 power, 16GB RAM, and a 1TB SSD.

item.title: 'Class-leading 4K camera': The impressive DJI Osmo Pocket 3 Creator Combo delivers 'amazing video quality and beautiful slow-motion scenes' — and content creators will love the Amazon discount too
item.description: This compact companion delivers premium features in a portable package.

item.title: Ransomware negotiator jailed for 70 months after he just helped infect victims with malware
item.description: Ransomware negotiator served 70-month prison sentence, and will have to forfeit everything he's gained.

item.title: Investors send General Fusion soaring in debut as first publicly traded fusion company
item.description: General Fusion started trading on the Nasdaq following a reverse merger that saw high redemptions.

item.title: 12 states sue to block Paramount’s $110B Warner Bros. deal
item.description: The states allege that the deal would harm movie theaters, basic cable distributors, and audiences.

item.title: The 6 wildest claims in Apple’s lawsuit against OpenAI
item.description: When Apple employees interviewed for jobs at OpenAI, the AI startup's hardware head allegedly asked them to show up with something unusual: components they were working on and unreleased product samples. That's according to a blockbuster lawsuit filed by Apple, which accuses OpenAI of stealing confidential documents, spying on hardware prototypes, and tricking one of […]...

item.title: Best SSD deals 2026 — big savings on Samsung, SanDisk, WD and more
item.description: I track SSD deals for a living — here are the best discount prices before storage costs spike again.

item.title: Ce récent TV LG QNED Mini LED de 65″ avec 4 ports HDMI 2.1 voit son prix passer sous les 1 000 €
item.description: Dalle QNED avec rétroéclairage Mini LED, ports HDMI 2.1, multiples compatibilités... Le TV LG 65QNED86B a plus d'un argument à faire valoir. En ce moment, Boulanger le propose en plus à 999 euros au lieu de 1 299 euros.

item.title: Disparition de OnePlus en France : l’annonce officielle serait imminente
item.description: D'après WinFuture, la disparition de OnePlus en Europe (dont la France) sera officialisée dès cette semaine.

item.title: Should AI help you get away with killing your spouse?
item.description: What does a world of total user-aligned AI actually look like?

item.title: I tested the first Freely 4K streaming box that instantly upgrades your TV with tons of live channels with no monthly subscription or aerial, plus access to the key streaming services — here’s why it impressed me
item.description: I unlocked live TV, smart apps, and intuitive voice controls with the Manhattan Aero streaming box.

item.title: Apple vs OpenAI lawsuit: 8 bombshell accusations and how the legal war might change your next iPhone
item.description: Apple's OpenAI lawsuit is full of truly eye-opening accusations that, if true, could doom OpenAI's hardware business and scuttle the partnership between the two companies.

item.title: Games Done Quick abruptly canceled SNK stream due to ties with Saudi Arabia
item.description: Games Done Quick said it would not accept funds from or work with SNK in the future.

item.title: The new Jackery FridgeGuard can keep your fridge cooling for up to 15 hours: Where to buy after launch
item.description: The Jackery FridgeGuard portable power station costs $549.99 and is sold exclusively at Costco.

item.title: The new Jackery FridgeGuard can keep your fridge cooling for up to 15 hours: Where to buy
item.description: The Jackery FridgeGuard portable power station costs $549.99 and is sold exclusively at Costco.

item.title: ACRouter picks the smartest AI model per task, beating Opus-only setups by 2.6x on cost
item.description: Model routing is becoming a key component of the enterprise AI stack, dynamically sending prompts to the right AI model to optimize speed and costs. However, current frameworks mostly treat routing as a static classification problem, which severely limits their potential.A new open-source framework called Agent-as-a-Router tackles this bottleneck, treating the router as a dynamic, memory-building agent. It uses a Context-Action-Feedback (C-A-F) loop to track model successes and failures and update the behavior of the router. The researchers also released ACRouter, a concrete implementation of ...

item.title: Experts say they were able to create a rogue agent in Google’s AI platform with just a single edit permission
item.description: One compromised agent could take over every other agent in that project, leading to chat logs access, and even data exfiltration.

item.title: Tom Cruise is officially in his TikTok era
item.description: Tom Cruise, new TikTok poster, stars in "Digger," directed by Alejandro González Iñárritu.

item.title: AT&T customers can make free international calls on World Cup match days. Here are all the details.
item.description: AT&T customers can make free calls to select World Cup team's countries on match days between midnight and 11:59 p.m.

item.title: New Steam Machine red light warning isn't anything to worry about — an overzealous overheating warning is reportedly due to a BIOS bug
item.description: Seeing a red light on your Steam Machine? Don't panic — it's most likely due to a bug that triggers a temperature warning to come on 'much earlier' than it should.

item.title: Une batterie externe en verre et métal : Bang & Olufsen dévoile son premier accessoire de charge
item.description: Bang & Olufsen lance sa toute première batterie externe, une Qi2 magnétique à 145 euros. Pour une marque habituée aux tarifs stratosphériques, c'est presque une bonne surprise.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Trifold 2 foldable could take a backseat to a ‘slideable’ phone
item.description: Samsung's first slideable phone may launch before the Galaxy Z TriFold 2, a new leak suggests.

item.title: Boulanger fait de l’ombre aux soldes en lançant une grande braderie : les 9 deals à saisir
item.description: Oubliez les soldes, Boulanger crée la surprise en lançant une opération déstockage sur une large sélection de produits Tech et ce jusqu'au 11 août. Smartphones, audio, TV… voici notre sélection des meilleures offres pour profiter des meilleures offres avant la rupture de stock.

item.title: There Are Endless Conspiracy Theories About Lindsey Graham’s Death
item.description: Despite a complete lack of evidence, everyone from Russia to Israel and Iran is being blamed for Lindsey Graham’s death.

item.title: A superb open world racing game is coming to Nintendo Switch 2, finally giving us a proper Forza Horizon alternative
item.description: Ubisoft has announced that its latest racing game is coming to Nintendo Switch 2.

item.title: Should AI companies be ‘forced’ to give half their stock to the public? Most Americans say yes
item.description: A new poll shows broad support for an idea proposed by Bernie Sanders, which could allow the public to financially benefit from the AI boom. Companies that build AI are changing the way Americans live, and most Americans want to share in the wealth.

item.title: Surprise dans le rachat de Warner Bros : la Californie veut faire capoter le projet de Paramount
item.description: Une dizaine d'États américains, Californie en tête, attaquent en justice pour bloquer le rachat de Warner Bros. par Paramount. Un dossier à 110 milliards de dollars qui pourrait tout faire capoter.

item.title: As TV-tracking app TV Time shuts down, its founder builds Bingers, a new home for fans
item.description: The creator of TV Time is building a successor app that will let users import their watch histories and preserve the community that formed around discussing their favorite shows.

item.title: Pixel 11 Pro Fold render reportedly leaks on Telegram
item.description: With a Made by Google event scheduled for Aug. 12, a new look at the Pixel 11 Pro Fold appeared in a leaked render.

item.title: Pas besoin de monter votre PC : ce monstre avec RTX 5070 et Ryzen 7 perd 590 € chez Darty
item.description: Le HP Omen 35L est une tour gaming qui embarque un AMD Ryzen 7 8700F, une RTX 5070 et 32 Go de DDR5. Elle passe de 2 489 euros à 1 899 euros sur Darty, soit 590 euros d'économies sur une configuration taillée pour le jeu en 1440p.

item.title: HPs 17-inch OmniBook 3 just dropped to its lowest-ever price — and its yours for under $450
item.description: Save $280 on the HP OmniBook 3 17.3-inch Laptop at Amazon. The Windows 11 PC is down to $449.99 from its typical $729.99 price.

item.title: EU plans to restrict social media for kids under 13
item.description: The President of the European Commission announced plans to restrict social media platforms for children under 13 today.

item.title: Anthropic starts localizing Claude pricing for India, its biggest market after the US
item.description: Claude users in India are starting to see Indian rupee-denominated subscription plans.

item.title: Moana's live action remake failed to make a splash at the box office as movie fans call it a 'lifeless carbon copy'
item.description: Moana's live action remake has not performed well at the box office, leading fans to criticize why we need new versions of our favorite animated movies.

item.title: You can easily scan QR codes that are already on your phone
item.description: Android and iOS both have built-in tools to easily open QR codes from screenshots.

item.title: The FCC is going after third-party companies that it suspects are sneaking rebranded DJI drones and cameras into the US
item.description: It appears that several companies might be importing DJI hardware into the United States under different names.

item.title: Amazon launches a big Fire TV sale — streaming sticks, TVs, and soundbars from $19.99
item.description: There's a huge Fire TV sale live right now at Amazon, so I've picked out the eight best deals on Fire TV Sticks, Fire TVs, and soundbars that are worth buying today.

item.title: Jusqu’à 280 € pour un jeu : pourquoi certains titres GameCube sont-ils devenus aussi chers ?
item.description: Certains jeux GameCube valent aujourd'hui entre 70 et 280 euros. Quant aux rayons GameCube des magasins de jeux vidéo rétro, ils sont bien souvent très peu fournis. Mais comment expliquer de tels prix et une telle rareté ?

item.title: Upgrade to a 240Hz ASUS ROG Strix OLED gaming monitor for $100 off
item.description: The ASUS 27-inch ROG Strix OLED gaming monitor is on sale for $100 off at Amazon. Grab it for just $799, its best price ever.

item.title: Pixel 11 Pro Fold : enfin un modem digne de ce nom pour la puce Tensor G6
item.description: Selon les documents de la Commission fédérale des communications américaine, le processeur Tensor G6 du futur Pixel 11 Pro Fold embarquerait un modem MediaTek au lieu de Samsung. Et ça change pas mal de choses.

item.title: Confused about your PC specs or hardware? Windows 11's Copilot app is getting new powers to help you 'understand your device'
item.description: Copilot app's new 'PC insights' feature has been greeted with some skepticism.

item.title: NordVPN is now part of Mastercard’s lifestyle perks — find out if you are eligible
item.description: Mastercard cardholders can now sign up for a NordVPN subscription without paying a penny. Here's all you need to know.
